stories.title: 142 AI data center protests staged in 42 states as public opposition increases — organizers brand 'unaccountable' buildouts as an 'unacceptable infringement on our liberty'

sources.title: 142 AI data center protests staged in 42 states as public opposition increases — organizers brand 'unaccountable' buildouts as an 'unacceptable infringement on our liberty'
sources.title_en: 142 AI data center protests staged in 42 states as public opposition increases — organizers brand 'unaccountable' buildouts as an 'unacceptable infringement on our liberty'
sources.title_original: 142 AI data center protests staged in 42 states as public opposition increases — organizers brand 'unaccountable' buildouts as an 'unacceptable infringement on our liberty'
sources.summary: Data center projects are facing increasing opposition from surrounding communities, making consent even far scarcer than the chips and power needed to run these facilities. Any developer planning to construct one must now consider the people living around the proposed site and take account for the months or years needed to approve it, if it even gets the green light.
sources.summary_zh: 数据中心项目面临着周边社区越来越多的反对，这使得同意比运行这些设施所需的芯片和电力更加稀缺。任何计划建造的开发商现在都必须考虑居住在拟议地点周围的人们，并考虑批准它所需的数月或数年，即使它获得了批准。

stories.title: Jensen Huang argues American companies should be allowed to use Chinese AI models — Nvidia CEO says backdoors connected to China are misconceptions

sources.title: Jensen Huang argues American companies should be allowed to use Chinese AI models — Nvidia CEO says backdoors connected to China are misconceptions
sources.title_en: Jensen Huang argues American companies should be allowed to use Chinese AI models — Nvidia CEO says backdoors connected to China are misconceptions
sources.title_original: Jensen Huang argues American companies should be allowed to use Chinese AI models — Nvidia CEO says backdoors connected to China are misconceptions
sources.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang raised several points against the rising sentiment in Washington that U.S. firms should be prevented from accessing Chinese AI models. He also advocates for open models, which he says makes AI more secure.
sources.summary_zh: 英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋针对华盛顿日益高涨的情绪提出了几点观点，即应阻止美国公司使用中国人工智能模型。他还提倡开放模型，他说这使得人工智能更加安全。

stories.title: AI tech companies have ‘hidden debt’ worth around $1.65 trillion, report claims — amount is 122% of debt reflected on the balance sheets of Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft, and Oracle

sources.title: AI tech companies have ‘hidden debt’ worth around $1.65 trillion, report claims — amount is 122% of debt reflected on the balance sheets of Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft, and Oracle
sources.title_en: AI tech companies have ‘hidden debt’ worth around $1.65 trillion, report claims — amount is 122% of debt reflected on the balance sheets of Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft, and Oracle
sources.title_original: AI tech companies have ‘hidden debt’ worth around $1.65 trillion, report claims — amount is 122% of debt reflected on the balance sheets of Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft, and Oracle
sources.summary: Five tech giants have $1.65 trillion in data center obligations that are listed off their balance sheets. These liabilities are added as footnotes in their quarterly statements but will become due and payable once these data centers start operating.
sources.summary_zh: 五家科技巨头有 1.65 万亿美元的数据中心债务，这些债务已从其资产负债表中列出。这些负债作为脚注添加到季度报表中，但一旦这些数据中心开始运营，这些负债将到期应付。

stories.title: USB 连接的未来 (2026) — USB4 版本 2 和 Thunderbolt 5 如何将铜带发挥到其物理极限 / The future of USB connectivity (2026) — How USB4 Version 2 and Thunderbolt 5 are bringing copper to its physical limits

sources.title: USB 连接的未来 (2026) — USB4 版本 2 和 Thunderbolt 5 如何将铜带发挥到其物理极限 / The future of USB connectivity (2026) — How USB4 Version 2 and Thunderbolt 5 are bringing copper to its physical limits
sources.title_zh: USB 连接的未来 (2026) — USB4 版本 2 和 Thunderbolt 5 如何将铜带发挥到其物理极限
sources.title_en: The future of USB connectivity (2026) — How USB4 Version 2 and Thunderbolt 5 are bringing copper to its physical limits
sources.title_original: The future of USB connectivity (2026) — How USB4 Version 2 and Thunderbolt 5 are bringing copper to its physical limits
sources.summary: The USB ecosystem is entering another transition that will affect how laptops, desktops, storage devices, displays, and peripherals connect in the second half of the decade.
sources.summary_zh: USB 生态系统正在进入另一个转变，这将影响笔记本电脑、台式机、存储设备、显示器和外围设备在本世纪后半叶的连接方式。

stories.title: Apple reportedly working on Mac leasing program in partnership with Klarna to fight RAM price increases — 'Apple Upgrade' would let users finance hardware over 36 months, budget models excluded

sources.title: Apple reportedly working on Mac leasing program in partnership with Klarna to fight RAM price increases — 'Apple Upgrade' would let users finance hardware over 36 months, budget models excluded
sources.title_en: Apple reportedly working on Mac leasing program in partnership with Klarna to fight RAM price increases — 'Apple Upgrade' would let users finance hardware over 36 months, budget models excluded
sources.title_original: Apple reportedly working on Mac leasing program in partnership with Klarna to fight RAM price increases — 'Apple Upgrade' would let users finance hardware over 36 months, budget models excluded
sources.summary: A new Bloomberg report is claiming that Apple is working on a leasing program called "Apple Upgrade" that will allow customers to finance hardware over the course of 2 or 3 years. At the end of the term, they can keep the device or hand it back, or even upgrade to a newer model if payments are completed early.
sources.summary_zh: 彭博社的一份新报告称，苹果正在开发一项名为“Apple Upgrade”的租赁计划，该计划将允许客户在 2 到 3 年内为硬件提供融资。期限结束时，他们可以保留设备或归还设备，如果提前完成付款，甚至可以升级到更新的型号。

stories.title: Chinese modder gets GeForce RTX 4060 working in Windows 11 on Huawei Arm workstation — uses modified driver borrowed from an Nvidia RTX Spark

sources.title: Chinese modder gets GeForce RTX 4060 working in Windows 11 on Huawei Arm workstation — uses modified driver borrowed from an Nvidia RTX Spark
sources.title_en: Chinese modder gets GeForce RTX 4060 working in Windows 11 on Huawei Arm workstation — uses modified driver borrowed from an Nvidia RTX Spark
sources.title_original: Chinese modder gets GeForce RTX 4060 working in Windows 11 on Huawei Arm workstation — uses modified driver borrowed from an Nvidia RTX Spark
sources.summary: Borrowing a driver from the upcoming RTX Spark, VoidTech managed to get x86 Windows games running on a Huawei Arm workstation.
sources.summary_zh: VoidTech 借用了即将推出的 RTX Spark 的驱动程序，成功地在华为 Arm 工作站上运行 x86 Windows 游戏。
